blockingIssues.description: Legacy round-1 review remains on disk, but the follow-up feature `json-import-matrix-review-parity-evidence` now adds the missing direct matrix/review assertions for imported projects. Current milestone evidence is sufficient for pass because the claimed parity gap is covered by commit 850a405 and its passing review report.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in `refactor-worker` that verification-only completion is acceptable when investigation shows the implementation already satisfies the feature and the remaining deliverable is regression coverage/evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `json-import-failure-and-duplicate-handling` and `import-edit-reload-cross-flow-parity` handoffs flagged skill deviations around manual smoke or test-only completion even though the reviewed work was storage-layer or verification-focused.

lint.command: uv run ruff check src tests
